mlkit_advanced_unsupported: Qalabka hadda ma taageerayo ML Kit Advanced
permission_reason: Si loo hubiyo in daaqada hoosaadka iyo aqoonsiga hadalka ay si sax ah u shaqeeyaan, fadlan u oggolow oggolaanshaha soo socda:
engine_whisper_desc: Isticmaal whisper.cpp; ka dib marka la ogaado dhamaadka jumlada, jumlada oo dhan waa la qori doonaa, iyada oo dib u dhac ku saabsan 3-5 ilbiriqsi.
engine_mlkit_basic_desc: Isticmaalka ML Kit Basic, oo laga heli karo inta badan aaladaha Android 12+.
engine_mlkit_advanced_desc: Si loo isticmaalo ML Kit Advanced, qalab taageera AICore/Gemini Nano ayaa loo baahan yahay.
cancel_download_message: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad tirtirto soo dejinta {model}? Horumarka soo dejinta hadda waa la lumin doonaa.
delete_model_message: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad tirtirto {model}? Hawlgalkan ayaa meesha ka saaraya faylka la soo dejiyay, waxaadna u baahan doontaa inaad mar kale soo dejiso ka hor intaadan isticmaalin.
translation_desc: Luuqada isha waxa lagu dabaqaa ML Kit iyo waliba si hoose marka turjumaada la furo.
translation_enabled_desc: Muuji isha iyo qoraal hoosaadyada la turjumay
status_service_failed: Adeegga qoraal hoosaadka tooska ah ayaa fashilmay.
error_no_overlay: Burinta codsiyada kale weli lama ogola.
error_checksum_failed: Ansixinta moodeelku wuu guuldarraystay: SHA-1 ee {model} kuma habboona kaydka rasmiga ah.
error_accessibility_service_unavailable: Adeegga Helitaanka Qoraalku kuma xidhna. Sug in yar oo isku day mar kale.
error_model_download_requires_network: Qaabka hadalka lama soo dejin Ku xidh intarneedka oo isku day markale.
error_sha1_mismatch: SHA-1 isma dhigma la'aan, la filayo {la filayo}, dhab ah {run}
mlkit_downloading: Qaabka {engine} wali waa la soo dejinayaa
error_translate_unsupported_lang: ML Kit Translate ma taageerto luqadda: {tag}
error_translate_source_unsupported: ML Kit ma taageero luqadda isha: {tag1} ({tag2})
error_translate_target_unsupported: ML Kit ma taageerayo luqadda la beegsanayo: {tag1} ({tag2})
